activation_mode.mechanism: Amp rule files load unconditionally; no conditional or model-decision activation documented

auto_memory.mechanism: Amp does not have an AI-generated auto-memory system

cross_provider_recognition.mechanism: Amp reads its own rule format; no cross-provider rule file recognition documented

file_imports.mechanism: No file import syntax documented for Amp rule files

hierarchical_loading.mechanism: Amp rule files are project-scoped; no subdirectory hierarchy documented

providerExtensions.name: Canonical filename: AGENT.md
providerExtensions.summary: Rules live in a fixed-name AGENT.md file with no frontmatter or directory wrapper — plain Markdown body only.

providerExtensions.name: Project-scope placement at repository root
providerExtensions.summary: AGENT.md sits at the project repo root; team-shared via version control, applied when Amp operates in that project.

providerExtensions.name: Plain Markdown, no frontmatter
providerExtensions.summary: AGENT.md is plain Markdown with heading-organized sections — no YAML frontmatter or structured metadata.
